datasets.description: Generic reference datasets: date calendar, weather, events.
Shared dimensions across domains: location, asset, currency, projects.
HR domain: employee, payroll, performance, saudization, headcount.
Finance domain: GL, budgets, forecasts, cashflow, capex.
Procurement domain: vendors, contracts, POs, WOs, receipts, tender pipeline.
Payments/AP domain: invoices, rejections, payments, overdue aging, disputes.
Six Flags asset domain: operations, rides, ticketing, footfall, POS, satisfaction.
AMC asset domain: cinemas, films, screenings, ticketing, F&B, occupancy, summaries.

tables.description: Daily calendar for time intelligence and planning. Grain: 1 row per Date. PK: Date.
Daily weather observations. Grain: 1 row per Location per Date. PK: (Date, Location_ID).
Event calendar with popularity and attendance for demand modeling. Grain: 1 row per event instance. PK: Event_ID.
Shared location dimension. Grain: 1 row per Location_ID.
Shared asset dimension. Grain: 1 row per Asset_ID.
Shared project dimension (development initiatives, zones, capex projects). Grain: 1 row per Project_ID.
Currency dimension. Grain: 1 row per Currency_Code.
Department/unit hierarchy. Grain: 1 row per Department_ID.
Job/title dimension. Grain: 1 row per Job_ID.
Compensation bands by grade/level. Grain: 1 row per Band_ID.
Employee master (no raw PII). Grain: 1 row per Employee_ID.
Daily HR snapshot. Grain: 1 row per Employee_ID per Date. PK: (Date, Employee_ID).
Monthly payroll per employee. Grain: 1 row per Employee per Payroll_Month. PK: (Payroll_Month, Employee_ID).
Performance appraisal results. Grain: 1 row per Employee per Cycle. PK: Appraisal_ID.
Increment events (merit/promotion/adjustment). Grain: 1 row per increment. PK: Increment_ID.
Absence days (sick/annual/other). Grain: 1 row per absence event per day. PK: (Date, Employee_ID).
tables.grain: 1 row per absent employee per day

tables.description: Employee exit events. Grain: 1 row per exit. PK: Attrition_ID.
Chart of accounts. Grain: 1 row per GL_Account_ID.
Cost centers for P&L and budgeting. Grain: 1 row per Cost_Center_ID.
GL journal lines for actuals. Grain: 1 row per journal line. PK: Journal_Line_ID.
Budget by month, cost center and account. Grain: 1 row per (Month, Cost_Center_ID, GL_Account_ID).
tables.grain: 1 row per Month x Cost Center x Account

tables.description: Forecast by month, cost center and account. Grain: 1 row per (Month, Cost_Center_ID, GL_Account_ID, Forecast_Version).
tables.grain: 1 row per Month x Cost Center x Account x Version

tables.description: Daily cashflow (in/out). Grain: 1 row per Date (optionally per bank account).
Capex spend by project. Grain: 1 row per Project_ID per Month.
Vendor master. Grain: 1 row per Vendor_ID.
Item/service catalog. Grain: 1 row per Item_ID.
Awarded contracts in detail. Grain: 1 row per Contract_ID.
Contract milestones progress. Grain: 1 row per milestone. PK: Milestone_ID.
Change orders/variations for contracts. Grain: 1 row per Variation_ID.
PO lines for spend analysis. Grain: 1 row per PO line. PK: PO_Line_ID.
Goods receipt (GRN) lines against PO. Grain: 1 row per receipt line. PK: GRN_Line_ID.
Work orders linked to contracts/assets. Grain: 1 row per Work_Order_ID.
Tender/RFQ/RFP pipeline lifecycle. Grain: 1 row per Tender_ID.
Vendor performance KPIs by month. Grain: 1 row per Vendor per Month.
Payment terms reference. Grain: 1 row per Payment_Terms_Code.
Invoice rejection reasons reference. Grain: 1 row per Reason_Code.
Invoice lifecycle for AP. Grain: 1 row per Invoice_ID.
Invoice lines for detailed spend analytics. Grain: 1 row per Invoice_Line_ID.
Rejected invoices and reasons. Grain: 1 row per rejection event. PK: Invoice_Rejection_ID.
Payments against invoices/contracts. Grain: 1 row per Payment_ID. PK: Payment_ID.
Daily overdue snapshot for aging analysis. Grain: 1 row per Invoice_ID per Date when open. PK: (Date, Invoice_ID).
tables.grain: 1 row per open invoice per day

tables.description: Invoice disputes lifecycle. Grain: 1 row per Dispute_ID.
Theme park gates. Grain: 1 row per Gate_ID.
Theme park rides. Grain: 1 row per Ride_ID.
F&B / Retail outlets. Grain: 1 row per Outlet_ID.
POS products for park (food/merch). Grain: 1 row per Product_ID.
Ticket product catalog. Grain: 1 row per Ticket_Product_ID.
Ticket sales transactions. Grain: 1 row per Ticket_TXN_ID.
Gate redemptions/entries for tickets. Grain: 1 row per redemption scan. PK: Redemption_ID.
Hourly gate footfall. Grain: 1 row per Gate_ID per hour. PK: (Gate_ID, Hour_TS).
Hourly ride operations KPIs (throughput, downtime). Grain: 1 row per Ride_ID per hour. PK: (Ride_ID, Hour_TS).
Ride downtime events (event-level). Grain: 1 row per downtime event. PK: Downtime_Event_ID.
POS purchases line-level for basket analysis. Grain: 1 row per POS_Line_ID.
Queue time samples (e.g., every 15 min). Grain: 1 row per Ride_ID per Sample_TS.
tables.grain: 1 row per ride per sample time

tables.description: Survey responses (NPS/CSAT). Grain: 1 row per Survey_Response_ID.
Operational/safety incidents. Grain: 1 row per Incident_ID.
Cinema dimension. Grain: 1 row per Cinema_ID.
Film dimension. Grain: 1 row per Film_ID.
Screening schedule (showtimes). Grain: 1 row per Session_ID.
Cinema ticket sales transactions. Grain: 1 row per Ticket_TXN_ID.
Concession products. Grain: 1 row per Product_ID.
F&B/concessions sales line-level. Grain: 1 row per FNB_Line_ID.
Derived occupancy KPIs per session. Grain: 1 row per Session_ID.
Independent semantic summary for dashboards. Grain: 1 row per Date per Cinema_ID.

notes: PK/FK are metadata only (BigQuery does not enforce).
Partitioning/clustering suggestions are included; apply via BigQuery API for best performance.
Seed plans are declarative; implement using your synthetic generator + optional LLM enrichment.
